name: ChkQuery_EventSignalValueMin, ChkQuery_EventSignalValueMax
title: ChkQuery_EventSignalValueMin, ChkQuery_EventSignalValueMax
description: Enables access to the minimal and maximal measured values within a check.

parameters.name: Note Use the int64 parameters for system variables of UInt64 and Int64 type to cover the whole value range. The int64 parameter is interpreted for system variables of UInt64 type as qword (uint64).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
